hero.body: Every session is a conversation between you and the Reformer — calibrated, precise, transformative.

philosophy.title: Strength built from stillness
philosophy.quote: The Reformer doesn't reshape the body. It teaches the mind to inhabit it.
philosophy.body1: Reformer Pilates is a practice of deliberate effort. Each spring, each strap, each breath is calibrated to meet you exactly where you are — not where you think you should be.
philosophy.body2: At Heiko Ryu, sessions are unhurried. We move slowly so you feel everything. Precision over speed. Depth over volume.

items.title: Private Sessions
items.desc: One-to-one coaching, completely tailored. The most direct path to change.

items.title: Duo Sessions
items.desc: Train alongside a partner and share the experience without losing personal attention.

items.title: Group Classes
items.desc: Small groups, never more than six. Every participant receives a trained eye.

studio.spaceTitle: A room that calms before you begin
studio.spaceBody: Natural light. Pale timber. Stone. Linen. The studio was designed as a place of quiet before it was ever a gym.
studio.equipmentBody: Every reformer is a Balanced Body — the benchmark for smooth spring action and precise resistance. Maintained to exacting standards, always.
studio.equipmentAlt: A Balanced Body Reformer in the studio

instructor.title: Meet Heiko
instructor.body1: Heiko Ryu trained in classical Pilates methodology under leading instructors in Berlin and Sydney. A decade spent working at the intersection of movement science and mindful practice.
instructor.body2: Before opening the studio, Heiko spent years in rehabilitation settings — supporting post-surgical recovery, chronic pain management, and athletic conditioning. Each session carries that depth.
instructor.body3: The approach is always the same: meet you where you are, listen to your body, and build from there.
instructor.instagramAria: Follow Heiko Ryu Pilates on Instagram (opens in new tab)

contact.title: Your first session is the hardest step.
contact.body: Reach out via Instagram to enquire about availability and introductory pricing.
contact.note: Studio location shared on enquiry · Sessions by appointment only

footer.instagramAria: Follow Heiko Ryu Pilates on Instagram (opens in new tab)
